product_overview: Fluxo is a PWA for end-to-end management of hospitality venues (POS, KDS, tables, inventory, reports and backoffice) built with React + TypeScript and Supabase. It centralizes sales, kitchen workflows, reservations, inventory and printing into a single serverless platform with a local print-server fallback.
core_goals: Provide a fast, mobile-first POS for taking orders, payments and printing receipts.
Deliver a real-time Kitchen Display System (KDS) that syncs orders and states across devices.
Offer complete backoffice functionality (customers, inventory, users, reports, history, promotions, reservations).
Support role-based access and multi-tenant workflows (company / branch).
Enable reliable local printing via a print-server with a browser fallback.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate staff to access the application and enforce role-based access.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid email -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Stay on /login

features.name: POS (Point of Sale)
features.description: Take orders, manage cart and checkout with multiple payment methods and automatic ticket printing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Ventas' -> Select products -> Add product to cart -> Click Checkout -> Select customer -> Choose payment method -> Confirm payment -> See success receipt printed

Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Ventas' -> Select products -> Add product to cart -> Click Checkout -> Choose payment method (Card) -> Payment gateway returns error -> See payment error message -> Return to cart

features.name: Kitchen Display
features.description: Display incoming orders in real-time and manage order states (Pending -> Preparing -> Ready -> Delivered).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Cocina' -> See list of incoming orders -> Open order card -> Mark order as ready -> See order status updated to Ready
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Cocina' -> See realtime disconnected indicator -> Attempt to mark order as ready -> See connection error message -> Retry connection

features.name: Customers
features.description: Manage customer records, including quick creation during checkout and viewing customer history.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Clientes' -> See customers list -> Click Add Customer -> Fill customer fields -> Click Save -> See new customer in list
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Clientes' -> Click Add Customer -> Leave required fields blank -> Click Save -> See validation error and remain on form

features.name: Reservations
features.description: Create and manage bookings with an agenda and optional WhatsApp confirmations.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Reservas' -> Click Create reservation -> Fill reservation details -> Click Save -> See reservation in agenda
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Reservas' -> Click Create reservation -> Enter invalid/overlapping time -> Click Save -> See validation error and remain on reservation form

features.name: Inventory
features.description: Manage products, stock levels, categories and pricing for accurate stock control.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Inventario' -> See product list -> Select product -> Update stock quantity -> Click Save -> See updated stock level
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Inventario' -> Select product -> Enter negative stock value -> Click Save -> See validation error and unchanged stock

features.name: History
features.description: Browse and filter past sales with export and annulment capabilities.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Historial' -> See list of past orders -> Apply date filter -> See filtered orders -> Export results to Excel
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Historial' -> Apply date range with no results -> See empty state message -> Adjust filters

features.name: Reports
features.description: Visual sales analytics and KPIs (daily sales, product rankings) to support decision-making.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Reportes' -> See dashboard charts and KPIs -> Adjust timeframe -> See charts update
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Reportes' -> See loading spinner -> Data API returns error -> See error message and retry option

features.name: Users
features.description: Administer staff accounts and assign roles (SuperAdmin, Admin, Cashier, Waiter, Cook).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Usuarios' -> See users list -> Click Add User -> Fill user details and role -> Click Save -> See new user in list
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Usuarios' -> Click Add User -> Assign invalid or duplicate email -> Click Save -> See validation/error message

features.name: Cash Register
features.description: Open and close cash shifts, record movements and perform end-of-day reconciliations.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Caja' -> Click Open register -> Enter opening amount -> Confirm -> See register status Open
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Caja' -> Attempt to close register while pending transactions exist -> Click Close register -> See warning about pending transactions and prevent close

features.name: Table Layout
features.description: Interactive floor map to open tables, add orders to tables and print pre-bills.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Salón' -> See table map -> Click free table -> Open table -> Add order to table -> Print pre-cuenta -> See table marked as occupied
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Salón' -> Click occupied table -> Attempt to open table for new seating -> See occupied warning and prevent duplicate open

features.name: Promotions
features.description: Create and manage discount rules and promotions applied at checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Promociones' -> Click Create promotion -> Fill promotion details (type, percent/2x1, validity) -> Click Save -> See promotion listed
Navigate to / -> Click sidebar 'Promociones' -> Click Create promotion -> Define overlapping promotion rules -> Click Save -> See validation/conflict warning and prevent save

routes.description: Main application entry. Renders Login if unauthenticated, Dashboard if authenticated.
